titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the William Edward Miller papers,1951-1964.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

profiledesc.creation: Finding aid encoded by Evan Fay Earle, July 2007

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the William Edward Miller Papers,1951-1964.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu
http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

titlepage.date: © 2007 Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Correspondence with constituents on numerous topics, clippings, tape recordings, press releases, speeches, and legislation. Also, material pertaining to the 1964 Presidential campaign, including campaign contributions, committee meetings, campaign speeches of the Miller and Goldwater campaign, and reports of the Republican National Committee and the John Birch Society.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Member of Congress from Lockport, New York; 1964 Republican nominee for the vice presidency.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence with constituents on numerous topics, clippings, tape recordings, press releases, speeches, and legislation. Also, material pertaining to the 1964 Presidential campaign, including campaign contributions, committee meetings, campaign speeches of the Miller and Goldwater campaign, and reports of the Republican National Committee and the John Birch Society.

unittitle.extref: Link to a copy of the printed finding aid. (PDF file)

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: William Edward Miller papers, #2391. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
